summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Spice POS v2 - Bills, Tables, Inventory, Guard, Analytics. All 33 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified all 5 role logins, captain bill flow (add items, KOT preview, send), chef KDS (per-item ✓/✗, department filter), cashier payments (red pending/green received badges), owner pages (tables, inventory, settings with geofence/IP whitelist).
critical_code_review_comments: All features working as expected - no critical issues found
Department routing correctly maps: Roti → Chinese Counter, Biryani → Main Kitchen, Beverages → Beverage Counter
Legacy staff@spice.com login correctly migrates to captain role
RBAC properly enforced: captain cannot POST inventory, chef cannot POST payment, cashier cannot POST bills
seed_data_creation: 12 tables (T1-T12), 30 menu items across categories, 10 inventory items seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Bills API endpoints tested and working. Department routing verified (Roti→Chinese Counter, Biryani→Main Kitchen, Beverages→Beverage Counter). KOT batching works with timestamps. Chef status updates (ready/cancelled/pending) work for chef/captain/owner. Payment recording by cashier works with cash/upi/card methods. Geofence is disabled by default so guard/check returns allowed=true. AccessGuard on frontend calls the endpoint and shows retry screen if blocked.

auth: Legacy staff@spice.com login migrates to captain role
Quick-login buttons on /login page work for all 5 roles
tables: GET /api/tables returns 12+ seeded tables with status available/occupied
Cannot delete occupied table (has open bill)
bills: Returns existing open bill if called twice for same table
POST /api/bills/{id}/items adds items with auto-department assignment
POST /api/bills/{id}/send-kot creates KOT batch with timestamp
Multiple KOT batches work (batch 1, batch 2, etc.)
DELETE /api/bills/{id}/items/{item_id} removes pending or marks sent as cancelled
inventory: GET /api/inventory accessible by owner and captain
guard: POST /api/guard/check returns allowed=true when geofence disabled
Owner is exempt from geofence checks
analytics: GET /api/analytics/summary returns orders_count, open_bills, pending_amount, payment_split
GET /api/analytics/export CSV contains Bill#, Captain, Payment, Method columns
settings: PUT /api/settings saves geofence_enabled, ip_check_enabled, allowed_ips, lat/lng/radius
frontend: Captain tables grid shows available/occupied counts
Captain bill page: menu search, category tabs, add items, notes per item, preview dialog, send KOT
Chef KDS: per-item ✓/✗ buttons, department filter (All/Main Kitchen/Chinese Counter/Sweets/Beverage)
Cashier payments: RED PAYMENT PENDING / GREEN PAYMENT RECEIVED badges, payment dialog with Cash/UPI/Card
Owner inventory: add/edit/delete stock items, low-stock alert
Owner settings: geofence toggle, IP whitelist, Use my location button
Bills page: table with Payment column showing red pending / green method badges
